questionHtml:
A power station generates 250 kW of power at a potential difference of 25 kV. The energy is transmitted through cables of total resistance 4.0 Ω.

What is the power loss in the cables?

A.  0.04 kW

B.  0.4 kW

C.  4 kW

D.  40 kW
